$comment: Region-neutral French. Holds the keys fr-FR omits, so fr-FR resolves them here (parent fallback). French plural: 0 and 1 are singular (one), 2+ are plural (other).

app.subtitle: Un moteur de localisation moderne basé sur JSON

player.songs: {count, plural, =0 {Aucune chanson} one {# chanson} other {# chansons}}
player.songsBy: {count, plural, =0 {Aucune chanson de {artist}} one {# chanson de {artist}} other {# chansons de {artist}}}

profile.invited: {gender, select, male {Il a invité {name}} female {Elle a invité {name}} other {Ils ont invité {name}}}

files.count: {count, plural, =0 {Aucun fichier} one {# fichier} other {# fichiers}}
